description: Allow-list of HIGH/CRITICAL npm-audit advisory IDs known and accepted at the workspace HEAD. Each entry must specify id (GHSA-*), package, severity, reason, expected_resolution. The CI gate (scripts/audit-check.sh, .github/workflows/ci.yml `npm:audit`) fails when `npm audit --audit-level=high --omit=dev --json` surfaces any HIGH/CRITICAL advisory whose id is not present here. Allow-list entries are time-bounded per ADR-0014 Decision 7. As of M4-close HK-PR-2, the 3 baseline GHSA IDs from PR-10 (GHSA-2w69-qvjg-hvjx / GHSA-q3j6-qgpj-74h6 / GHSA-v39h-62p7-jpjc) have been resolved via react-router-dom 6.22.0 → 6.30.3 (exact-pin) + fast-uri override 3.1.2; allow-list is empty going forward. CI gate fires only on NEW HIGH/CRITICAL findings.
